vBRIEFInfo.description: Story 1 of #883 v1: minimal scm:* stub (4 commands) with strong forward-compat marker pointing at #881. Wave 1 of the linear cohort; ships first; provides the scm:issue:view interface that Story 2 cache:fetch-all consumes.

plan.title: feat(scm): minimal stub (4 commands) for #883 v1 cache layer

narratives.Problem: The #883 v1 cache layer needs a fetching layer underneath it; visionik's design doc explicitly puts scm:* tasks between external content and cache:put. Building cache:* against raw `gh` calls inline violates the layering and makes #881 (full scm:* namespace) harder to land later. v1 needs a minimal stub that captures the 4 commands the cache layer actually uses, no more.
narratives.Overview: Ship `tasks/scm.yml` exposing 4 scm:* commands as thin ghx-or-gh fallback wrappers: scm:issue:list, scm:issue:view, scm:issue:close, scm:issue:edit. Strong forward-compat marker at file top points at #881 for the full namespace. Each command emits JSON via --json. PR commands (scm:pr:list/view/merge/close) deferred to v2.
narratives.Constraint: DO NOT EXTEND beyond the 4 commands without coordinating with #881. ghx-or-gh fallback uses shutil.which probe pattern. Output JSON shape must be stable enough for Story 2's cache:fetch-all to parse without per-version conditionals. Tests MUST be hermetic (mock subprocess); the single integration smoke test is the only exception and must skip on DEFT_NO_NETWORK=1.
narratives.Outcome: task scm:issue:list / view / close / edit functional via ghx (when on PATH) or gh (fallback). task -l shows the 4 commands cleanly. Forward-compat marker visible at top of tasks/scm.yml. Story 2 can call `task scm:issue:view --json title,number,...` and parse the result. Adoption blocker for Story 2 cleared.
narratives.Test: Unit tests on JSON shape (mock subprocess; per-command argv assertions; ghx-then-gh fallback path verified via shutil.which mock; --json flag forwarded). 1 integration smoke test exercising real `gh issue view 1 --repo deftai/directive --json title,number` asserting non-empty JSON body; skipped under DEFT_NO_NETWORK. ~50 LOC unit + ~20 LOC integration. Contract-test fixture obligation: tests/fixtures/scm_issue_view.json (NEW) is owned by Story 1 and reused verbatim by Story 2's cache:fetch-all unit tests; the JSON-shape contract pinned in tests/test_scm_contract.py is the Story 1→2 handoff guard.
narratives.Action: Create tasks/scm.yml with 4 thin wrapper tasks. Wire into parent tasks/Taskfile.yml includes block. Add unit tests + 1 integration smoke. Ship single PR. Run review-cycle. Merge. Story 2 dispatch unblocks.

items.title: tasks/scm.yml NEW: 4 commands (scm:issue:list / view / close / edit) as ghx-or-gh fallback wrappers; --json output by default
Forward-compat marker comment block at top of tasks/scm.yml: STUB for #883, DO NOT EXTEND, DO NOT ADD NEW COMMANDS HERE, full namespace lives at #881
Parent tasks/Taskfile.yml includes wiring: 4 commands reachable via `task -l` with no doubled prefix (canonical names: scm:issue:list, etc.)
tests/test_scm_stub.py: unit tests mock subprocess; assert per-command argv shape; assert ghx-then-gh fallback when ghx absent; assert --json forwarded; ~50 LOC
tests/integration/test_scm_smoke.py: 1 integration test exercising real `gh issue view 1 --repo deftai/directive --json title,number`; skip on DEFT_NO_NETWORK=1

tests/test_scm_contract.py (or extension to tests/test_scm_stub.py): JSON-shape contract test pinning the exact field set Story 2's cache:fetch-all consumes from scm:issue:view and scm:issue:list. MUST assert presence and types on `scm:issue:view --json` output for at minimum: number, title, body, state, author, createdAt, updatedAt, labels, comments; AND on `scm:issue:list --json` output for at minimum: number, title, state, updatedAt. Test fixture lives at tests/fixtures/scm_issue_view.json and is referenced by both Story 1's contract test AND will be reused verbatim by Story 2's cache:fetch-all unit tests. Rationale: prevents Story 1→2 contract drift; the prior #845 6-parallel swarm produced 4 integration bugs at composition time; this contract pin is the v1 mitigation for the linear-wave handoff.
task check passes (validate + lint + test + verify:encoding + verify:branch); no regressions
CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] -> ### Added: feat(scm): minimal stub for #883 v1 (4 commands; ghx-or-gh fallback; #883 Story 1)

blocks_stories: Story 2 (cache infra; needs scm:issue:view interface; reuses tests/fixtures/scm_issue_view.json contract fixture from Story 1)
